caribbean.headline: Roatan Winds Climb, Seas Near Seven Feet
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing sustained ENE winds near 23 kt with seas to 6.7 ft, an ENE swell at a 9 s period, and a 38% rain probability. I recommend small-boat operators secure for choppy conditions and limit exposed passages, while St. Lucia ports remain much calmer with winds around 10 kt.

mediterranean.headline: Choppy Seas Near Mykonos; Lighter Winds in Venice
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northerly winds up to 21 kt with seas to 5.6 ft and an NNE swell period of 6 s, while Venice has lighter winds near 11 kt. I advise small craft to exercise caution around Mykonos given the short 6 s NNE swell and choppy 5 to 6 ft seas, and note there is less than 10% rain probability.
